title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, September 28 2021
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 28/09/2021
Image reference: 2021-09-28_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-september-28-2021_img1.png
Tanker: Mid-age LR1s have firmed slightly. Aframaxes Bunga Kelana 7 and Bunga Kelana 8 (105,200 DWT, Jan & Mar 2004, Samsung) sold in an en bloc deal for USD 26.60 mil, VV en bloc value USD 24.53 mil - DD Due. MR2 Ocean Mars (50,300 DWT, May 2007, SLS) sold to Greek buyers for USD 9.00 mil, VV value USD 9.86 mil - At Auction.
